name: @seydx/rtsp
description: RTSP media relay that fans out a single upstream source to many consumers (RTSP server, FFmpeg, raw callbacks) with two-way audio support
author: seydx (https://github.com/seydx/rtsp)

scripts.docs:dev: npm run predocs && vitepress dev docs --port 5173
scripts.docs:build: npm run predocs && rimraf docs/.vitepress/dist && vitepress build docs
scripts.docs:preview: npm run predocs && vitepress preview docs --port 5174
scripts.release:patch: npm run build && node scripts/prepare-release.js patch
scripts.release:minor: npm run build && node scripts/prepare-release.js minor
scripts.release:major: npm run build && node scripts/prepare-release.js major
scripts.release:beta:patch: npm run build && node scripts/prepare-release.js beta-patch
scripts.release:beta:minor: npm run build && node scripts/prepare-release.js beta-minor
scripts.release:beta:major: npm run build && node scripts/prepare-release.js beta-major
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm i --package-lock-only && npm run lint:fix && npm run format && npm run build
